name: worktree-isolation
description: Worktree: create isolated worktree, make changes, verify isolation, exit and cleanup
prompt:
Use the EnterWorktree tool to create an isolated git worktree named 'bench-test'.
Inside the worktree, create a file called 'worktree-test.txt' with content 'isolated-work'.
Verify the file exists inside the worktree.
Then use ExitWorktree to return to the original directory.
Verify that 'worktree-test.txt' does NOT exist in the original directory (confirming isolation).
Report the results.
